query:
SELECT source_id,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_operational=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as operacionais,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='contribuinte' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contribuinte,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='obrigacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as obrigacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='direito' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direitos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='vedacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vedacoes
FROM regulatory_requirements
GROUP BY source_id
ORDER BY source_id;

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_operational=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as operacionais,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_scope='contribuinte' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as contribuinte,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='obrigacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as obrigacoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='direito' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direitos,
  SUM(CASE WHEN normative_type='vedacao' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vedacoes
FROM regulatory_requirements
GROUP BY source_id
ORDER BY source_id;
